question: According to Forethought's 'How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?' paper, what probability do the authors assign to the software intelligence explosion compressing more than 3 years of AI progress into less than 1 year?

expected_citation.title: How quick and big would a software intelligence explosion be?

source_passage: We think that the software intelligence explosion will probably (~60%) compress >3 years of AI progress into <1 year, but is somewhat unlikely (~20%) to compress >10 years into <1 year.
